abilities.name: Blinded by the Light
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to make a Scheme marker in base contact with a friendly model within 8".

abilities.name: Demise (Possessing Flame)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may discard a card to heal 3. Then, place this model into base contact with a Pyre marker within 6", if able.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Hungry Flickers
triggers.text: Choose a different model within range and remove a Burning token from it. Deal 2 damage to the chosen model.

triggers.name: Pyrebloom
triggers.text: Make a Pyre marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Hovering Flame
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Models moved through this way gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Catch Light
triggers.text: Make a Pyre marker in base contact with this model.
